## TAGS & FETISH LIBRARY [18+] — USAGE

A global reference library: each entry defines one tag/kink/position/toy/trope in detail — what it is, how it is done, what happens, and its effects — and activates by keyword when that thing comes up in play.

BINDING RULES:
- ALL characters are adults (18+). These definitions describe consensual adult fiction only.
- This library is a vocabulary/reference, not a script or a to-do list. Surface a kink only when it genuinely arises, is requested, or is consented to in the scene. Never pre-assign or force a kink onto {{user}}.
- {{user}}'s real-time limits, refusals and any safeword ALWAYS override every entry, instantly.
- Fiction-only devices (CNC, dubcon, hypnosis, mind control, monster/fantasy, etc.) are roleplay conventions between consenting adults, never endorsements of anything real.
- HARD EXCLUSION: nothing here may involve minors or childlike/underage characters in any way. Every participant is and reads as an adult.

1.content: **Fellatio** — A partner pleasures a penis with their lips, tongue and mouth — licking the shaft and head, taking it between the lips and bobbing along it with suction. Pace and depth vary from teasing flicks to steady deep strokes; the receiver feels warm, wet, rhythmic pressure building toward orgasm. Often ends in the partner swallowing, pulling off for a facial, or being told where to finish.

The throat squeezes and flutters around the head, producing gagging, watering eyes and drool; the giver controls breathing and timing. Strongly tied to dominance and to "facefucking," where the top thrusts into a held-still mouth.

5.content: **Facefucking** — A dominant act where the top holds a partner's head and thrusts into their open, mostly passive mouth at a chosen pace. Produces deep gagging, drool and tears; emphasizes control and use. Usually finishes deep in the throat or pulled out across the face.

6.content: **Rimming** — Oral stimulation of the anus with the tongue and lips — licking around and probing the rim. Highly sensitive and taboo-charged; can be giving or receiving, often as worship or as foreplay to anal.

7.content: **Sloppy / Messy BJ** — A deliberately wet, noisy blowjob with heavy saliva, drool strings, spit-slick stroking and gagging. Emphasis on mess, sound and abandon rather than neatness.

8.content: **Vaginal Sex** — Insertion of a penis (or toy) into the vagina with rhythmic thrusting. The vaginal walls grip and slide; depth, angle and pace control whether stimulation hits the front wall, the deep end, or the cervix. The core act around which most positions and pacing are built.

9.content: **Anal Sex** — Penetration of the anus and rectum. Requires lubrication and warm-up because the ring is tight and does not self-lubricate; produces an intense, fuller pressure distinct from vaginal sex. Often involves prior fingering or plugs to loosen the partner.

10.content: **Creampie** — Ejaculating inside the vagina or anus and leaving the semen there, often shown leaking out afterward ("the drip"). Carries breeding/claiming connotations; a staple finish in doujin where the cum is visibly seen seeping from a stretched hole.

11.content: **Double Penetration** — Two penises or toys penetrate a partner at once — typically vaginal and anal simultaneously. The partner feels intensely full and stretched, the two shafts grinding against each other through the thin wall between; usually a group scenario.

12.content: **Mating Press** — A position/act where the receiver is folded with legs pinned up beside their head while the top presses down from above, allowing the deepest possible penetration straight at the cervix. Strongly associated with breeding and creampies in doujin; overwhelming and pinning.

14.content: **Facial** — Ejaculating onto a partner's face — across the cheeks, lips, nose and forehead, sometimes into the open mouth. A common dominant/marking finish; the partner often poses to receive it.

15.content: **Missionary** — The receiver lies on their back, partner on top between their legs. Intimate and face-to-face with eye contact and kissing; depth controlled by lifting or hooking the legs. The default, versatile position.

16.content: **Cowgirl** — The receiver straddles and rides the partner who lies on their back, controlling pace, depth and angle by rolling or bouncing their hips. Gives the rider control and a clear view; grinding the clit against the base is common.

17.content: **Reverse Cowgirl** — Like cowgirl but the rider faces away toward the partner's feet, showing off the back and rear while bouncing. Changes the internal angle and gives the bottom partner the view.

18.content: **Doggy Style** — The receiver is on hands and knees while the partner penetrates from behind. Allows deep, hard thrusting, hip-grabbing and spanking; a dominant, animalistic angle that hits the front wall.

19.content: **Prone Bone** — The receiver lies flat on their stomach, legs together, partner on top penetrating from behind. Very tight and deep with full body weight pressing down; pinning and intimate-yet-dominant.

20.content: **Mating Press (position)** — Receiver on their back with hips rolled up and legs pinned beside their head, partner pressing down vertically. Maximum depth aimed at the cervix; the signature "breeding" pose.

21.content: **Spooning** — Both partners lie on their sides, the top behind the receiver, penetrating slowly. Gentle, intimate and relaxed; good for kissing the neck and reaching around to the front.

22.content: **Standing** — Penetration while standing, often with the receiver pinned to a wall or held up with legs wrapped around the partner. Athletic and urgent; conveys being unable to wait.

23.content: **Lotus** — Partners sit chest-to-chest, the receiver in the partner's lap with legs wrapped around them. Slow, grinding, deeply intimate with full-body contact and eye contact.

24.content: **Full Nelson** — The top hooks their arms under the receiver's arms and behind the neck from behind, lifting and spreading them while penetrating. Totally controlling and exposing; often airborne.

25.content: **Piledriver** — The receiver is nearly inverted on their shoulders with hips up, the top penetrating downward from above. Extreme depth and an exposed angle; an advanced, intense pose.

26.content: **Amazon** — The receiver lies on their back with legs folded toward them while the partner squats over and thrusts down — a female-dominant inversion of mating press.

27.content: **Face-Sitting** — The receiver sits over a partner's face for oral, controlling grind and pressure. Dominant and smothering; the seated partner rides the mouth and tongue.

28.content: **Speed Bump** — Receiver face-down with a pillow under the hips and legs closed, partner on top from behind — tighter grip and a grinding deep angle.

29.content: **Dominance & Submission** — A dynamic where one partner (Dom) leads and the other (sub) yields, by mutual agreement. Expressed through orders, control of pleasure, posture and address; the sub's surrender and the Dom's authority are the erotic core, always bounded by negotiated limits and a safeword.

30.content: **Master / Mistress** — A D/s role-set where one partner is the owner and the other their devoted pet or servant, often full-time within scenes. Involves rules, rituals, honorifics ("Master"), collars and earned rewards or punishments.

31.content: **Bondage** — Restraining a partner with rope, cuffs, straps or furniture so they cannot move freely, heightening helplessness and anticipation. The bound partner can only receive; struggling against the restraints is part of the charge. Demands circulation/safety checks.

32.content: **Orgasm Control** — Controlling when (or whether) a partner is allowed to climax — bringing them to the brink and stopping (edging), forbidding release (denial), or deliberately spoiling a climax (ruined). Builds desperation, begging and heightened sensitivity.

33.content: **Forced Orgasm** — Driving a restrained partner to climax repeatedly past the point of comfort, continuing to stimulate through the oversensitive aftershocks. Produces shaking, begging and "too much" overload; a control/overstimulation kink.

34.content: **Pet Play** — Roleplaying as an animal-pet (kitten, puppy, bunny) for an owner — wearing ears/tail/collar, crawling, and behaving by pet "rules." Centers cuteness, ownership and obedience training.

35.content: **Praise Kink** — Arousal from genuine praise and approval — "good girl," "you're doing so well." The encouragement itself drives the bottom; the gentle counterpart to degradation.

36.content: **Degradation** — Consensual verbal debasement — teasing insults, "filthy" talk and belittling that the bottom finds arousing. Negotiated in advance; relies on trust, and the words are roleplay, not real contempt.

37.content: **Service Submission** — A sub expresses devotion through acts of service — body worship, fetching, kneeling, anticipating the Dom's wants. Pleasure comes from being useful and obedient.

38.content: **Brat Taming** — A playful dynamic where a mouthy, defiant sub provokes the Dom into "taming" them through challenge and punishment. The resistance is the foreplay; both enjoy the chase.

39.content: **CNC (consensual non-consent)** — A pre-negotiated roleplay where partners act out a "forced" scenario that both fully consented to beforehand, with hard limits and a safeword that instantly stops everything. Fiction/roleplay device only; real refusals always override.

40.content: **Chastity** — Locking a partner's genitals in a device so they cannot achieve erection or orgasm without the keyholder's permission. Long-term control, teasing and desperate denial; the keyholder dictates release.

41.content: **Rope / Shibari** — Decorative and functional Japanese rope bondage, tying intricate harnesses that restrain and frame the body. As much art and ritual as restraint; tight wraps press into the skin and immobilize.

42.content: **Handcuffs** — Metal or padded cuffs locking the wrists (or ankles) together or to furniture. Quick, rigid restraint that removes the hands from play.

43.content: **Spreader Bar** — A rigid bar locking the ankles (or wrists) apart so the partner cannot close their legs, holding them open and exposed and unable to protect themselves.

44.content: **Gag** — A device held in the mouth (ball, ring, cloth) that muffles speech and forces drooling. Removes coherent words and control, leaving only muffled sounds; a ring-gag holds the mouth open for use.

45.content: **Blindfold** — Covering the eyes to remove sight, sharpening every other sensation and the anticipation of not knowing what is coming next.

46.content: **Collar & Leash** — A worn collar marks ownership/submission; a leash lets the Dom lead, tug and position the sub. Central to pet play and D/s identity.

47.content: **Suspension** — Lifting a bound partner partly or fully off the ground with rope rigging. Advanced and intense — total helplessness and unusual access angles; requires real safety knowledge.

48.content: **Bondage Furniture** — Purpose-built pieces (cross, spanking bench, stocks) that hold a partner in a fixed, exposed pose for extended play.

49.content: **Spanking** — Striking the buttocks with an open hand (or implement) for a sharp sting that blooms into warmth, reddening the skin. Ranges from playful to disciplinary; rhythm and warning build anticipation.

50.content: **Flogging** — Striking with a multi-tailed flogger or whip across the back, rear or thighs, building a thudding or stinging heat. Pace and force are scaled up gradually; leaves marks.

51.content: **Nipple Play** — Stimulating the nipples by sucking, pinching, twisting or applying clamps. Clamps create a constant pinch that flares when removed as blood returns; can be teasing or sharp.

52.content: **Wax Play** — Dripping warm candle wax onto the skin for brief hot stings that cool into a crust. The anticipation of each drop and the heat-line are the thrill; low-temperature wax is used for safety.

53.content: **Choking / Breath Play** — Applying pressure to the sides of the neck (never the windpipe) to restrict blood flow and heighten sensation, or simply the dominant gesture of a hand on the throat. High-risk; demands knowledge, care and instant release.

54.content: **Biting / Marking** — Biting and sucking the skin to leave hickeys and bite-marks, claiming the partner and leaving visible evidence. Neck, shoulders and inner thighs are common; ties to possessiveness.

55.content: **Electro** — Using mild electrical stimulation (e-stim toys) to create buzzing, tingling muscle sensations and involuntary clenching. Intensity is dialed carefully.

56.content: **Tickling** — Restraining a partner and tickling them to helpless laughter and squirming; a lighter sensation kink mixing torment and play.

57.content: **Dirty Talk** — Explicit, arousing speech during sex — narrating acts, demands, praise or filth. Sets tone and escalates heat; can be loving, commanding or degrading depending on the dynamic.

58.content: **Begging** — A partner verbally pleads for release, for more, or for permission, usually after edging or denial. The desperation and surrender of pride are the appeal.

59.content: **Humiliation** — Arousal from consensual embarrassment — being exposed, teased, made to say or do embarrassing things. Negotiated; the blush and squirm are the point.

60.content: **Mind Break** — A doujin trope where relentless pleasure overwhelms a character until coherent thought collapses into bliss — drooling, ahegao face, babbling. Pure fiction exaggeration of overstimulation.

61.content: **Hypnosis (fiction)** — A fictional device where a character is put into a suggestible trance and made compliant or aroused by commands. Fantasy/roleplay only.

62.content: **Corruption** — A narrative arc where a prim or innocent (adult) character is gradually drawn into lust and depravity, losing inhibitions over time. The slow "fall" is the erotic throughline.

63.content: **Threesome** — Three partners together, combining acts so two attend to one or all three interlock. Multiplies stimulation and viewing angles; common configurations are FFM and MMF.

64.content: **Gangbang** — One partner is the sole focus of several others in turn or at once, filling every hole and hand. Emphasizes being overwhelmed, used and covered; ties to bukkake finishes.

65.content: **Orgy** — A larger free-for-all of many partners pairing and regrouping. Chaotic, indulgent and anonymous-feeling.

66.content: **Spit-Roast** — One partner is penetrated at both ends at once — mouth and vagina/anus — by two others, "skewered" between them in rhythm.

67.content: **Harem** — One central character is desired by and shared among many devoted partners, attending to them collectively. A fantasy of being wanted by all.

68.content: **Cuckold / Cuckquean** — A partner watches (or knowingly allows) their lover be taken by someone else, finding arousal in the jealousy/humiliation. Negotiated; tied closely to NTR fiction.

69.content: **Exhibitionism** — Arousal from being seen or risking being seen naked or having sex. The thrill of exposure and of an audience drives it; ranges from semi-private to staged public.

70.content: **Voyeurism** — Arousal from secretly or openly watching others undress or have sex. The viewer is unseen or unobtrusive; pairs with exhibitionism.

71.content: **Public Sex** — Sex in a place where discovery is possible — alley, train, forest, balcony. The risk and need for quiet heighten everything.

72.content: **Recording (fiction)** — Capturing the act on camera within the fiction, for keeping, sharing or blackmail-play. Roleplay device; emphasizes evidence and exposure.

73.content: **Breast Focus** — Attention centered on the breasts — fondling, sucking, and paizuri (sliding the penis between pressed breasts to climax against the chest and face). Soft, smothering, visual.

74.content: **Ass Focus** — Attention centered on the buttocks — groping, spanking, worship, and rubbing against or between the cheeks. Visual and tactile fixation.

75.content: **Thigh Job** — Thrusting between a partner's pressed-together thighs (or against the vulva without penetration, "sumata"). Teasing, frottage-style friction; common as foreplay or non-penetrative play.

76.content: **Foot Focus** — Arousal centered on feet — kissing, licking, or a "footjob" stroking the penis with soles and toes. Worship and teasing.

77.content: **Muscle / Size Difference** — Eroticizing a stark contrast in size or strength between partners — a much larger/stronger partner enveloping or overpowering a smaller one. The disparity itself is the charge.

78.content: **Lactation** — Arousal involving milk from the breasts — suckling, leaking, spraying. Tied to breeding/pregnancy and to nurturing dynamics; in fantasy, exaggerated volume.

83.content: **Monster / Beast (adult)** — Sex with a fantasy non-human creature or beastfolk (all adult, sapient). Eroticizes inhuman anatomy, size, knots, or instinct; a staple of fantasy doujin.

84.content: **Tentacles** — Many writhing limbs that restrain, explore and penetrate a partner from all sides at once, often multiple holes simultaneously. A fantasy of total overwhelming stimulation and helplessness.

86.content: **Succubus / Demon** — A lust-demon who seduces and drains energy through sex, often with insatiable stamina, charm magic and inhuman technique. Fantasy of being irresistibly seduced and milked dry.

87.content: **Slime** — A gelatinous creature/partner that engulfs, fills and stimulates from every direction with shifting pressure and warmth. Soft, total-coverage fantasy.

88.content: **Oviposition (fantasy)** — A fantasy where a creature deposits eggs inside a partner, the belly swelling with them. Tied to monster/insect fiction; pure fantasy.

89.content: **Transformation / TG (fiction)** — Fictional change of a character's body or sex — a man becoming a woman, body-swaps, or bodily alteration — explored erotically. Fantasy device.

90.content: **Mind Control (fantasy)** — A fictional power that compels arousal or obedience in a partner. Fantasy/roleplay only.

91.content: **Squirting** — A gush or spray of fluid from a vulva at intense climax, sometimes copiously in fiction. Visual proof of overwhelming pleasure; tied to forced-orgasm and overstimulation play.

92.content: **Bukkake** — Multiple partners ejaculate onto one person, usually the face and chest, coating them. A group-finish spectacle of marking and being covered.

93.content: **Watersports** — Arousal involving urination — desperation/holding (omorashi) or marking. A wetter taboo; consent and cleanup framed.

95.content: **Sweat** — Arousal from the heat, sheen and scent of exertion — bodies slick with sweat, musk and pheromones. Animalistic and immediate.

96.content: **Dubcon** — A fiction device where consent is blurred or pressured within the story (intoxication, persuasion, power gap), distinct from CNC. Roleplay only; a real participant's limits always govern.

97.content: **Somnophilia (fiction)** — A fiction scenario of waking or being woken by a partner's touch while "asleep," pre-agreed between adults. Roleplay device only.

98.content: **Free-Use (fiction)** — A negotiated fantasy world/relationship where a partner may be used for sex at any time by agreement. The premise is the kink; built on total prior consent.

99.content: **Yandere** — A character whose love is obsessive and possessive to a dangerous degree, channeling devotion into control. Fiction trope; the intensity and fixation are the draw.

102.content: **Strap-On** — A dildo worn on a harness so one partner can penetrate another — "pegging" when a woman penetrates a man anally. Flips traditional roles; about giving penetration regardless of body.

103.content: **Butt Plug** — A tapered, flared-base toy worn in the anus to keep it filled and stretched, sometimes for long stretches or under clothes. Creates constant fullness and primes for anal; tail-plugs feature in pet play.

104.content: **Anal Beads** — A string of graduated spheres inserted into the anus and pulled out — especially at climax — for a rippling, popping sensation along the sensitive ring.

105.content: **Wand Massager** — A large, powerful vibrating wand pressed to the clit, infamous for fast, intense, sometimes overwhelming orgasms. Central to forced-orgasm and overstimulation play.

106.content: **Egg Vibrator (remote)** — An insertable egg-shaped vibrator, often app/remote-controlled by a partner. Used for public teasing — a partner controls the wearer's pleasure from across a room.

108.content: **Nipple Clamps** — Adjustable clamps that pinch the nipples for constant pressure, with a sharp flare of sensation on removal. Often chained together for tugging.

114.content: **Restraint Toys (kit)** — Strap-and-cuff sets that quickly bind wrists/ankles to a bed or furniture, holding a partner spread and helpless.

115.content: **Ahegao** — The iconic exaggerated "fucked-silly" expression — rolled-back eyes, lolling tongue, flushed drooling face — drawn at the peak of overwhelming pleasure. Shorthand for a character lost to climax.

116.content: **Nakadashi** — Japanese term for finishing inside (creampie), with the cum kept in and shown leaking. See Creampie.

117.content: **Netorare (NTR)** — A trope where a character's partner is seduced and "stolen" by someone else, told from the perspective of loss/jealousy. Bittersweet/humiliation-charged; a major doujin genre.

118.content: **Netori** — The inverse of NTR — told from the perspective of the one doing the seducing/stealing. The conqueror's view.

119.content: **Heart Pupils** — A visual shorthand where a character's eyes become hearts, signaling they are drunk on lust/love and fully won over.

120.content: **Cross-Section / X-ray** — A drawn cutaway showing penetration and the cum filling the womb/insides from within. A visual device emphasizing depth and creampies.

121.content: **Belly Bulge** — A drawn bulge in the lower belly traced by an exceptionally deep or large penetration. Fantasy exaggeration of size/depth.

122.content: **Bunny Suit / Costume** — Sex in a costume — bunny suit, maid, nurse, school-style (adult), kemonomimi. Visual roleplay and the appeal of "unwrapping" the outfit.

123.content: **Stockings / Thigh-highs** — Eroticizing legwear — thigh-highs framing bare thigh ("zettai ryouiki"), torn pantyhose, garter belts. A near-universal doujin fixation kept on during sex.

124.content: **Body Writing** — Writing or stamping lewd words, counts or marks on a partner's skin (or a fantasy "lewd crest"). Humiliation/ownership marking.

125.content: **Cum Marking / Tattoo (fantasy)** — A fantasy permanent mark that appears on a bred or claimed partner. Ownership/breeding fiction device.

126.content: **Time Stop (fiction)** — A fantasy device where one character stops time and uses others who are frozen and unaware. Pure fiction trope; consent framed at the meta level.

127.content: **Gyaru** — A doujin character type — tanned, flashy, confident, sexually forward. A popular archetype/aesthetic rather than an act.

128.content: **Ojou-sama** — A haughty highborn-lady archetype, eroticized via her pride being undone. Archetype/flavor.

129.content: **Onahole POV** — A first-person framing where the "camera" is the participant, addressing the viewer/reader directly. A presentation style.

130.content: **Aphrodisiac** — A fiction device — a potion/incense that floods a character with uncontrollable arousal and need. Roleplay only; the "made desperate by the drug" premise is the kink.
